violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and the side emergency exit, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk in cooler) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
The outside refuse areas have an accumulation of debris. The refuse area shall be maintained and cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
